---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: stellababy2004
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 📱 Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots/Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain your problem.

## 🌐 Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 12]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 108, Firefox 107]
- **Device**: [e.g., Desktop, Mobile]
- **URL**: [e.g., https://helpchain.live/some-page]

## 📊 Additional Context

- **User Role**: [e.g., Guest, Volunteer, Admin]
- **Time of Occurrence**: [e.g., 2025-10-08 14:30 UTC]
- **Frequency**: [e.g., Always, Sometimes, Once]
- **Related Issues**: [Link to related issues if any]

## 🔒 Security Impact

- [ ] This bug involves sensitive data exposure
- [ ] This bug could be exploited for unauthorized access
- [ ] This bug affects data integrity
- [ ] Other security concern

**If security-related, please email security@helpchain.live instead of posting here.**

---

**Priority Assessment:**

- 🔴 **Critical**: System down, data loss, security breach
- 🟠 **High**: Major functionality broken, affects many users
- 🟡 **Medium**: Minor functionality issue, workaround available
- 🟢 **Low**: Cosmetic issue, enhancement request
